narrative:
Dover Township has 2,046 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 32.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.8 percentage points.
